title: Wadhwa Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Wadhwa Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Wadhwa Group in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Wadhwa Group:
Wadhwa Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wadhwa Group!
